question: How many days had passed between the Hindu festival of Holi and the Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church?
gold_answer: 21 days. 22 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: From memory m_329f0e35b1c702322df5 (source 90), user attended Holi on February 26, 2023. From memory m_91b4ea6e66afb94028d3 (source 139), user attended Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church on March 19, 2023. The difference between March 19 and February 26 is 21 days.
